questions.text: Which unit is used to measure long distances?
questions.explanation: Kilometer (km) is used for measuring long distances like between cities. 1 km = 1000 m.

questions.text: A moving object changes its position with time.
questions.explanation: Motion is defined as the change in position of an object with respect to time and its surroundings.

questions.correctAnswer: Motion that repeats at regular intervals of time.
questions.explanation: Periodic motion repeats after fixed time intervals. Examples: pendulum swing, Earth's rotation.
1 meter = 100 centimeters. This is the standard conversion in the metric system.
